---
title: "L20: Quantitative Interactions"
author: "Your Name"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

## Board Prediction Verification

The push-up interaction model:
$$\hat{y} = 20 + 4 \cdot \text{Sleep} + 0.3 \cdot \text{Warmup} + 0.2 \cdot \text{Sleep} \times \text{Warmup}$$

```{r}
pred_pushups <- function(s, w) 20 + 4*s + 0.3*w + 0.2*s*w

# Verify board calculations
data.frame(
  Sleep = c(6, 8, 6, 8),
  Warmup = c(5, 5, 15, 15)
) %>%
  mutate(Pushups = pred_pushups(Sleep, Warmup))
```

```{r}
# Effect of Sleep depends on Warmup
cat("Effect of Sleep (6->8) at Warmup=5:", pred_pushups(8,5) - pred_pushups(6,5), "\n")
cat("Effect of Sleep (6->8) at Warmup=15:", pred_pushups(8,15) - pred_pushups(6,15), "\n")
```

## Interaction Slice Plot

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
grid <- expand.grid(Sleep = seq(4, 10, by = 0.5), Warmup = c(5, 10, 15))
grid$Pushups <- pred_pushups(grid$Sleep, grid$Warmup)

ggplot(grid, aes(x = Sleep, y = Pushups, color = factor(Warmup))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(x = "Sleep (hours)", y = "Predicted Push-ups",
       color = "Warmup (min)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Competition: Production Line Downtime

```{r}
# Replace "alpha" with your assigned line name:
# alpha, bravo, charlie, delta, echo, foxtrot, golf, hotel
my_line <- read_csv("data/line_alpha.csv")
head(my_line)
```

### Explore

```{r, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
ggpairs(my_line)
```

### Fit Models

```{r}
# Additive model (replace variables as needed)
model_add <- lm(Downtime_hrs ~ Temp_C + Pressure_psi, data = my_line)
summary(model_add)
```

```{r}
# Interaction model
model_int <- lm(Downtime_hrs ~ Temp_C * Pressure_psi, data = my_line)
summary(model_int)
```

```{r}
# Partial F-test
anova(model_add, model_int)
```

### Visualize the Interaction

```{r, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
my_line <- my_line %>%
  mutate(Pressure_group = cut(Pressure_psi,
                               breaks = quantile(Pressure_psi, c(0, 0.33, 0.67, 1)),
                               labels = c("Low", "Med", "High"),
                               include.lowest = TRUE))

ggplot(my_line, aes(x = Temp_C, y = Downtime_hrs, color = Pressure_group)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Temperature (C)", y = "Downtime (hrs/wk)", color = "Pressure") +
  theme_minimal()
```
